title: Thai Garlic Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful Thai stir fry made with garlic and your choice of ingredients. Serve over rice or noodles for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sick and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the fry and Thai, and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
